review_scope: fresh reset + independent 30-method review of plan, built artifacts, projections, install and PR-preflight wiring

C1.name: 矛盾なし
C1.summary: install identity は marketplace 正本から解決し、common TOML の所有範囲を hook/discovery semantic contract として実装・文書で一致させた

C2.name: 漏れなし
C2.summary: Claude settings/symlink、Codex hooks/config、.agents discovery、導入後同期、PR-preflight差分、rollback fixtureを被覆した

C3.name: 整合性あり
C3.summary: dual manifest、exact plugin identity、route/task graph/digest、delivery owner、公式project surfaceを同じ語彙へ同期した

C4.name: 依存関係整合
C4.summary: C02→C01→{C03,C05}→C04、install→apply→check、PR-preflight apply→checkを直列化し、runtime user gateを分離した

method_coverage.finding: installer test自身が誤った @harness identity を固定
method_coverage.resolution: marketplace.json.name を実行時解決し @skills 回帰テストへ修正

method_coverage.finding: 欠落surfaceをapplyで復元する要件に対し .agents discovery writer が不在
method_coverage.resolution: common TOML discovery entry から未知entry非破壊で marketplace を原子再生成

method_coverage.finding: manifest/marketplace/ledgerに形状検査のみで再生成・再pin不足の傾向
method_coverage.resolution: marketplace writer、fresh digest pin、ledger更新経路を追加

method_coverage.finding: focused tests緑とC01赤の原因はplan digest stale
method_coverage.resolution: 現5正本digestへplan-findingsを再生成

method_coverage.finding: install→enable→applyが最初のidentity誤りで途切れる
method_coverage.resolution: 固定marketplace名を廃止しinstall後C01 apply/checkへ到達可能化

method_coverage.finding: Claude/Codex projectは生成可能だがCodex discoveryだけ静的検査
method_coverage.resolution: Codex adapterの第三managed outputとしてdiscoveryを追加

method_coverage.finding: 導入・投影・証跡・PR表示の4領域に独立gap
method_coverage.resolution: dynamic installer、adapter、digest ledger、expanded git diffへ分割修正

method_coverage.finding: Product×LifecycleでClaude installとCodex applyが欠落
method_coverage.resolution: identityとdiscoveryを低コスト高忠実度の優先修正とした

method_coverage.finding: make -jでapply/check sibling prerequisitesが競合可能
method_coverage.resolution: 各target recipe内のsubmakeでapply→checkを直列化

method_coverage.finding: common TOMLを完全SSOTとする説明と複数正本の実data flowが不一致
method_coverage.resolution: TOML=hook/discovery意味論、manifest/marketplace=capability/activation正本と再定義

method_coverage.finding: marketplace identityがinstall/activationで別固定値
method_coverage.resolution: root marketplace nameからexact identityを導出する共通規則へ抽象化

method_coverage.finding: 仕様改善後のdigestが外ループへ還流せずroute successとcompletionが矛盾
method_coverage.resolution: task graph再導出・state repin・findings pinを同じ周回で更新

method_coverage.method: ブレインストーミング
method_coverage.finding: identity解決の6案を比較
method_coverage.resolution: 既存root marketplace正本をruntime読取する最小案へ収束

method_coverage.finding: Codex project hookはcommand完全一致のみで世代更新時に旧生成物を残す
method_coverage.resolution: stable owner/id markerで旧managed handlerを置換しforeign hooksを保持

method_coverage.finding: 設定が収束していてもstale plan evidenceがSessionStart自己修復を毎回warning化
method_coverage.resolution: freshness pinを周回内で更新し原因別remediationを保持

method_coverage.finding: bundle installerだけ旧 @harness を残しactivation exact identityと乖離
method_coverage.resolution: activationと同じplugin@marketplace規則をinstallerへ適用

method_coverage.finding: 並列makeとproject hook command変更で非決定・重複が発生
method_coverage.resolution: serial recipeとstable managed markerを追加

method_coverage.finding: 文書から .agents が生成されるか事前準備か判別不能
method_coverage.resolution: common contractの所有範囲、生成面、user gate、非生成面を明記

method_coverage.finding: TOMLはCodex hooks/configだけを駆動し .agents を再現不能
method_coverage.resolution: discovery schema/payload/writer/parity/rollbackをend-to-end追加

method_coverage.finding: plan変更→digest stale→C02 fail→C01/TG-C08/CI block
method_coverage.resolution: 現graph hashと5 artifact digestへ全証跡を再pin

method_coverage.finding: C05がstale freshness warningを新sessionごとに反復
method_coverage.resolution: freshnessをlocal completion前に必ず閉じruntime gateと分離

method_coverage.finding: 単一完全SSOT化は簡潔だがmanifest固有情報を重複させる
method_coverage.resolution: 複数native正本をC01がjoinする第三案で忠実度と簡潔性を両立

method_coverage.finding: install同期の価値が誤identityで両製品に届かない
method_coverage.resolution: dynamic install後にClaude/Codex/.agentsを一括apply/check

method_coverage.finding: PR不要でも将来PR準備差分がmanaged symlinkを表示しない
method_coverage.resolution: preflight diff scopeを全managed projection/dual manifestへ拡張

method_coverage.finding: 将来project hook追加でownership migrationが曖昧
method_coverage.resolution: versioned TOML schemaとstable managed marker、foreign preservationを導入

method_coverage.finding: 根因は実装・計画・runtime evidenceを同一current graphへ収束する経路欠落
method_coverage.resolution: derive→repin→route evidence→ledger→completionの順序を正本化

method_coverage.finding: malformed hooks/TOMLが未捕捉TypeError/KeyErrorになり得る
method_coverage.resolution: contractと既存hooksの型/必須keyをfail-closed検証

method_coverage.finding: fresh cloneで全managed settings再生成仮説がdiscovery欠落で反証
method_coverage.resolution: 欠落marketplace再生成とfixture rollback→restore→reapplyを追加

method_coverage.finding: TOMLが完全generation SSOTかsemantic contractか未決
method_coverage.resolution: semantic contract + native manifests joinと決定し全仕様へ反映

method_coverage.finding: SSOT生成・lifecycle・evidence・robustnessの4島
method_coverage.resolution: discovery→installer→freshness→robustnessの依存順で修正

round2_resolutions: bundle name is passed to Python only through sys.argv and quote/code payload regression is fixed
native-surfaces.toml activation.claude_marketplace is mechanically compared with root marketplace name
Codex hooks/config/discovery use preimage rollback plus readback as one managed transaction
PR preflight prints scoped git status so untracked native surfaces are visible before diff
local observation/remediation and non-applicable merge observation are separated from runtime SessionStart user gate
Codex adapter reports the child changed path count instead of a constant
